testcase.name: testEndToEndCheckout
testcase.failure: java.lang.RuntimeException: java.lang.NoSuchMethodError: 'org.apache.commons.io.input.BoundedInputStream$Builder org.apache.commons.io.input.BoundedInputStream.builder()' at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) Caused by: java.lang.NoSuchMethodError: 'org.apache.commons.io.input.BoundedInputStream$Builder org.apache.commons.io.input.BoundedInputStream.builder()' at org.apache.poi.util.IOUtils.peekFirstNBytes(IOUtils.java:153) at org.apache.poi.poifs.filesystem.FileMagic.valueOf(FileMagic.java:209) at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.opc.internal.ZipHelper.verifyZipHeader(ZipHelper.java:147) at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.opc.internal.ZipHelper.openZipStream(ZipHelper.java:191) at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.opc.ZipPackage.<init>(ZipPackage.java:210) at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.opc.OPCPackage.open(OPCPackage.java:518) at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.opc.OPCPackage.open(OPCPackage.java:491) at org.apache.poi.ooxml.util.PackageHelper.open(PackageHelper.java:67) at org.apache.poi.xssf.usermodel.XSSFWorkbook.<init>(XSSFWorkbook.java:318) at org.apache.poi.xssf.usermodel.XSSFWorkbook.<init>(XSSFWorkbook.java:292) at utils.ExcelUtils.getTableArray(ExcelUtils.java:13) at tests.EndToEndCheckoutTest.getCheckoutData(EndToEndCheckoutTest.java:45) ... 25 more ... Removed 30 stack frames
